component.name: Linux Soundboard
component.summary: Native Linux soundboard with virtual microphone support

description.p: A high-performance, native Linux soundboard built with Rust, GTK4, and Libadwaita. Play sounds directly into your microphone stream for Discord, OBS, Zoom, and any other application.

ul.li: Virtual microphone that seamlessly mixes your voice with soundboard audio
LUFS normalization for consistent volume levels
Global hotkeys (works on X11, XWayland, and Wayland with portal support)
Modern GTK4/Libadwaita UI with dark mode support
Organized sound library with tabs and folder sync
Drag and drop support for easy sound import

description.p: Patch release for packaging and release metadata consistency:

ul.li: Added third-party license notices and README acknowledgments
Refreshed release package metadata and install examples
Kept native Wayland and X11 support documentation aligned with shipped artifacts
Native Wayland support with X11 fallback
Better virtual microphone creation on modern distributions
